title: Endless Enchantments
description: Uncaps enchantment levels on anvils (up to 255). Includes configurable villager trades with uncapped levels.
body: Uncaps enchantment levels on anvils (up to 255). Villager trades including the uncapped enchant levels. Also adds new cost system for trades made by this mod (to allow the higher costs needed for the high level enchants). Highly customizable in the config.
